user.title: Set up EcoTracker Emulator
user.description: The mDNS service is announced as `{prefix}<MAC>`. The MAC suffix should start with the EcoTracker OUI `{oui}` for best client compatibility – a random suggestion is pre-filled. Serial and product ID are sent as TXT records.

data.mac_suffix: MAC suffix (12 hex chars, no separators)

error.invalid_mac_suffix: MAC suffix must be exactly 12 hexadecimal characters (separators are stripped automatically).
error.invalid_serial: Serial must be exactly 12 hexadecimal characters.
error.invalid_product_id: Product ID must not be empty.

abort.already_configured: This service name is already in use.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one EcoTracker Emulator instance can be configured.
